name: Trust / certification & partner logo bar
structure: horizontal strip of greyscale logos; often above footer or under hero
prevalence: certifications cited by ~70% (eidg. Diplom) / 68% (RAB); built sites only used text
visual: Horizontal strip of greyscale certification/software/award logos, equal height.
placement: Directly under the hero, or as a band above the footer.
animation: Logos fade-in or marquee auto-scroll loop; greyscale→colour on hover.
benchmarks: Vanta — SOC2/ISO badges as permanent furniture
Stripe/Notion — marquee logo wall under hero
